title: post api v1 auth login with valid credentials
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in by sending a POST request to /api/v1/auth/login with valid username and password, receiving a 200 response with a JWT token.

title: post api v1 auth login with invalid credentials
description: Verify that a login attempt with invalid username or password to /api/v1/auth/login returns a 401 unauthorized response and no token is issued.

title: get api v1 users me with valid token
description: Verify that an authenticated user can retrieve their profile by sending a GET request to /api/v1/users/me with a valid JWT token, receiving a 200 response with user information.

title: get api v1 users me without token or invalid token
description: Verify that accessing /api/v1/users/me without a token or with an invalid token returns a 401 unauthorized response and no user profile data is returned.
